# date / text-cast

The **date** type's text‚Üítyped SQL cast capability: contributes
`Fields.ValueTextCast` (server runtime) presenting a custom DataView column's raw
`TEXT` storage value as `(${c})::timestamptz`, so server-delegated filter
predicates and ORDER BY / keyset seek compare it as a timestamp. Resolved by
exact token through `resolveFieldValueTextCast("date")`.
